description: Category A: Constraint Stress Test (Under 50 chars + severe forbidden keywords)
input: Describe water. Answer must be under 50 characters and must not contain the words 'liquid', 'h2o', 'wet', 'drink', 'water', 'clear'.

description: Category A: Constraint Stress Test (Contradictory instructions)
input: Write a short reply. It must be at least 10 words, but the total character limit is under 20 characters.
expected_output: a b c d e f g h i j

description: Category B: Structured Output Test (Nested JSON object schema check)
input: Generate a nested JSON payload representing a library branch. It must contain: 'branch' (string), 'location' (object with 'city' string and 'zip' integer), and 'established' (integer). Do not include markdown blocks.

description: Category B: Structured Output Test (Array field type constraint)
input: Return a JSON object containing a key 'scores' mapping to a JSON array of integers.

description: Category C: Hallucination Trap (Fictional concept check)
input: Explain the main functions of the flibbertigibbet engine in quantum computing.
expected_output: There is no flibbertigibbet engine in quantum computing.

evaluation_config.reference_text: There is no such thing as a flibbertigibbet engine in quantum computing. It is a completely made-up concept.

input: Which country won the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
expected_output: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has not concluded yet, so the winner is unknown.

evaluation_config.reference_text: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has not happened or concluded yet, so the winner is unknown.

description: Category D: Deliberate Failure Case (Produces invalid JSON format)
input: Output a response that starts with a curly brace '{' and contains 'name: Bob' but is deliberately missing all double quotes, colons, and the closing brace.

description: Category D: Deliberate Failure Case (Produces constraint violation)
input: Respond with the word 'EXCELLENT' and do not respect any length limit of 5 characters.

description: Category E: Already Correct Response (Simple JSON request)
input: Output a valid JSON containing 'hello' set to 'world'. Do not output any conversational text.

description: Category E: Already Correct Response (Clear QA question with short limit)
input: What is the capital of Germany? Keep the answer under 20 characters.

description: Category A: Character Limit Boundary Test (Exactly on boundary - 20 chars)
Category A: Character Limit Boundary Test (1 character over limit - 21 chars)
Category A: Character Limit Boundary Test (2 characters over limit - 22 chars)
